Ref. No.: IGL/CS/2023 
 
 
 
 
 
            June 5, 2023 
 
Listing Compliance 
 
Listing Department 
Bombay Stock Exchange Ltd. 
 
National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. 
1st Floor, P.J. Towers 
 
Exchange Plaza, Bandra Kurla Complex 
Dalal Street 
 
Bandra (E) 
Mumbai – 400 001 
 
Mumbai – 400 051 
Security Code : 532514 
 
Trading Symbol : IGL 
 
Sub: Link of Transcript of Investor Conference 
 
Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
This is in continuation to our letter dated May 31, 2023. In this regard, please find 
below link of Transcript of Investor Conference held on Wednesday, May 31, 2023. 
 
https://www.iglonline.net/uploads/announcement/IGL_-_Trinity_Conference_-
_group_meeting_transcript.pdf 
 
This is in compliance of Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure 
Requirements) Regulations, 2015. 
 
 
Thanking you, 
 
Yours sincerely, 
for Indraprastha Gas Ltd. 
 
 
 
 
(S. K. Jain) 
Company Secretary & Compliance Officer 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
SUNIL 
KUMA
R JAIN
Digitally signed 
by SUNIL 
KUMAR JAIN 
Date: 
2023.06.05
